violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the beverage cooler shelves and back inside surface have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023

The floors under food racks and refrigeration units have an accumulation of soil residue and/or dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2023
